specific_question: By July 1, 2025, did Elexion Automotive integrate supplier audit data into its central asset lifecycle system?
answer: Yes. A system integration log dated June 28, 2025 confirms that supplier audit data was successfully incorporated into Elexion Automotive’s lifecycle management platform.
dr_question: By Q2 2026, how can Elexion Automotive leverage the integration of digital engineering methodologies with digital twins to optimize EV battery performance and lifecycle management, while ensuring regulatory compliance across North American markets?
